description_long: This is a modern, single-seat fighter jet with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage painted in a striking combination of deep blue, yellow, and red. The aircraft features a sharply pointed nose, a bubble canopy cockpit, and a delta wing configuration with pronounced leading-edge sweep and small winglets at the tips. The vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers are painted yellow, and the jet is equipped with twin engine exhausts at the rear. Under the wings, there are visible pylons with mounted external fuel tanks or ordnance. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it is likely retractable, and the overall design emphasizes speed and agility, typical of advanced military aircraft.
description: A sleek, modern fighter jet with a blue, yellow, and red color scheme, delta wings, and a single-seat bubble canopy cockpit. Twin engine exhausts and underwing pylons are visible.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, bubble canopy, wide delta wings, and yellow-tipped stabilizers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sharply angled nose, cockpit placement, underwing pylon, and yellow vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin engine exhausts, delta wing span, and yellow accents on the stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cockpit, underwing pylon, and yellow stabilizer details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing delta configuration with pronounced leading-edge sweep and small winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible, inferred from design).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a bubble canopy.
